Blind does not affect abilities that trigger on-hit effects, unless otherwise stated. • Nilah's Jubilant Veil • Jax's Counter Strike • Shen's Spirit's Refuge • Teemo's Blinding Dart"><span class="mw-default-size" typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="64" height="64" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>Blocked</span></div></div></div></div>
<ul><li>The bonus attack damage granted by <i>Determination</i> stacks will update dynamically with <b>Zaahen's</b> total attack damage.</li>
<li><i>Determination</i> stacks are generated per damage instance per champion damaged with <b>Zaahen's</b> attacks and abilities.
<ul><li><i><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Zaahen" data-ability="The Darkin Glaive" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Zaahen#The_Darkin_Glaive" title="An icon for Zaahen's ability The Darkin Glaive"><img alt="An icon for Zaahen's ability The Darkin Glaive" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_The_Darkin_Glaive.png/20px-Zaahen_The_Darkin_Glaive.png?d12cf" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_The_Darkin_Glaive.png/40px-Zaahen_The_Darkin_Glaive.png?d12cf 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#The_Darkin_Glaive">The Darkin Glaive's</a></span></span></i> initial cast empowered attack can generate a stack for each strike.</li>
<li>Both passes of <i><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Zaahen" data-ability="Dreaded Return" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Zaahen#Dreaded_Return" title="An icon for Zaahen's ability Dreaded Return"><img alt="An icon for Zaahen's ability Dreaded Return" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Dreaded_Return.png/20px-Zaahen_Dreaded_Return.png?de70a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Dreaded_Return.png/40px-Zaahen_Dreaded_Return.png?de70a 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Dreaded_Return">Dreaded Return</a></span></span></i> can generate a stack.</li>
<li>Both <i><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Zaahen" data-ability="Aureate Rush" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Zaahen#Aureate_Rush" title="An icon for Zaahen's ability Aureate Rush"><img alt="An icon for Zaahen's ability Aureate Rush" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Aureate_Rush.png/20px-Zaahen_Aureate_Rush.png?dd046" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Aureate_Rush.png/40px-Zaahen_Aureate_Rush.png?dd046 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Aureate_Rush">Aureate Rush's</a></span></span></i> swing and <i><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Zaahen" data-ability="Grim Deliverance" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Zaahen#Grim_Deliverance" title="An icon for Zaahen's ability Grim Deliverance"><img alt="An icon for Zaahen's ability Grim Deliverance" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Grim_Deliverance.png/20px-Zaahen_Grim_Deliverance.png?6be08" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Grim_Deliverance.png/40px-Zaahen_Grim_Deliverance.png?6be08 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Grim_Deliverance">Grim Deliverance's</a></span></span></i> shockwave generate a stack for every champion hit.</li>
<li><span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Ivern" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ivern" title="An icon representing Ivern"><img alt="An icon representing Ivern" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ivern_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Ivern_OriginalSquare.png?e28f2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ivern_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Ivern_OriginalSquare.png?e28f2 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Ivern" title="Ivern">Ivern's</a></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Ivern" data-ability="Triggerseed" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ivern#Triggerseed" title="An icon for Ivern's ability Triggerseed"><img alt="An icon for Ivern's ability Triggerseed" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ivern_Triggerseed.png/20px-Ivern_Triggerseed.png?1f1c8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ivern_Triggerseed.png/40px-Ivern_Triggerseed.png?1f1c8 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Ivern#Triggerseed" title="Ivern">Triggerseed</a></span></span></span> generates a stack for every champion hit when cast on <b>Zaahen</b>.<sup><span class="basic-tooltip" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;" title="This is not intended.">(bug)</span></sup></li></ul></li>
<li>During the resurrection's health restoration, <b>Zaahen's</b> <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Health" title="Health"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Health_icon.png/15px-Health_icon.png?f8c57" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Health_icon.png/30px-Health_icon.png?f8c57 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal"><b>current</b> health</span></span> is set to a percentage of his <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal"><b>maximum</b> health</span> equal to the cumulative amount of health restored on that restoration tick, for every single tick.
<ul><li>In other words, his current health will always be overridden by the percentage of health he is supposed to have restored on every restoration tick, to prevent him from healing or restoring health by other sources.</li></ul></li>
<li>Upon the resurrection being triggered, all <a href="/en-us/Summoner_spell" title="Summoner spell">summoner spells</a> that are not already on cooldown are placed on a 5-second <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Cooldown" title="Cooldown"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cooldown_icon.png/15px-Cooldown_icon.png?50d14" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Cooldown_icon.png?50d14 2x" data-file-width="20" data-file-height="20"></a></span> cooldown</span>.</li>
<li>The <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Untargetability"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Untargetable" title="An icon representing the keyword Untargetable"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Untargetable" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/20px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/40px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Untargetable" class="mw-redirect" title="Untargetable">untargetability</a></span> from the resurrection does not <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; <li><i>Determination</i> stacks are displayed in a secondary resource bar under <b>Zaahen's</b> <a href="/en-us/Health_bar" title="Health bar">health bar</a>.
<ul><li>The bar is <span style="color:white"><b>white</b></span> at <4 stacks, <span style="color:yellow"><b>yellow</b></span> at ≥4 stacks and <span style="color:darkorange"><b>orange</b></span> at ≥9 stacks.
<ul><li>At maximum stacks, if the revive is available, the bar will be <span style="color:red"><b>red</b></span> and will remain <span style="color:red"><b>red</b></span> after <b>Zaahen</b> revives until he loses stacks again.<sup><span class="basic-tooltip" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;" title="This does not match expectations.">(unexpected)</span></sup></li></ul></li></ul></li>
<li>There's a short delay between the stacks falling off and the removal of the revive. If <b>Zaahen</b> triggers it during this time, it will fail to go on cooldown.<sup><span class="basic-tooltip" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;" title="This is not intended.">(bug)</span></sup></li>

<ul><li><i>The Darkin Glaive's</i> damage is tagged as <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage" title="An icon representing the keyword Basic damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/20px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/40px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage" title="Damage">basic damage</a></span> and <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage" title="An icon representing the keyword Spell damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Spell damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Annie_Disintegrate.png/20px-Annie_Disintegrate.png?bbde6" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Annie_Disintegrate.png/40px-Annie_Disintegrate.png?bbde6 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage" title="Damage">spell damage</a></span>, which allows it to trigger <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects" title="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects" title="Ability effects">spell effects</a></span>.</li>
<li><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell shield"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Spell_shield" title="An icon representing the keyword Spell shield"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Spell shield" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/20px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/40px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Spell_shield" title="Spell shield">Spell shield</a></span> will only block the knock up from the recast.</li>
<li>Since the healing is granted on-attack, parrying effects will not prevent <b>Zaahen</b> from gaining the heal. Otherwise, parrying effects will negate all other aspects of <i>The Darkin Glaive's</i> attacks while consuming them.</li>
<li>The ability will not heal against wards, plants, or structures.</li>
<li>The first cast's double-strike attack:
<ul><li>Rolls <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Critical strike"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Critical_strike" title="An icon representing the keyword Critical strike"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Critical strike" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/20px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/40px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f 2x" data-file-width="144" data-file-height="144"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Critical_strike" title="Critical strike">critical strike</a></span> once for both strikes.</li>
<li>Does not cause <b>Zaahen</b> to attack twice.
<ul><li>Effects that trigger on-attack or interact with the attack windup will only trigger once and thus do not interact with <i>The Darkin Glaive</i>. (e.g. <span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Lethal Tempo" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Lethal_Tempo" title="An icon representing Lethal Tempo"><img alt="An icon representing Lethal Tempo" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Lethal_Tempo_rune.png/20px-Lethal_Tempo_rune.png?18aa4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Lethal_Tempo_rune.png/40px-Lethal_Tempo_rune.png?18aa4 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a href="/en-us/Lethal_Tempo" title="Lethal Tempo">Lethal Tempo</a></span></span>, <span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Hail of Blades" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Hail_of_Blades" title="An icon representing Hail of Blades"><img alt="An icon representing Hail of Blades" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Hail_of_Blades_rune.png/20px-Hail_of_Blades_rune.png?9b79e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Hail_of_Blades_rune.png/40px-Hail_of_Blades_rune.png?9b79e 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a href="/en-us/Hail_of_Blades" title="Hail of Blades">Hail of Blades</a></span></span>).</li></ul></li>
<li>Will consume <span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Bone Plating" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Bone_Plating" title="An icon representing Bone Plating"><img alt="An icon representing Bone Plating" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Bone_Plating_rune.png/20px-Bone_Plating_rune.png?a2255" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Bone_Plating_rune.png/40px-Bone_Plating_rune.png?a2255 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a href="/en-us/Bone_Plating" title="Bone Plating">Bone Plating</a></span></span> once.<sup><span class="basic-tooltip" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;" title="This is not intended.">(bug)</span></sup>
<ul><li>If the first strike triggers the rune, the second one will get blocked by it.</li>
<li>If the first strike is blocked by the rune, the second one will not.</li></ul></li></ul></li>
<li>The 1.<small>5</small>-second delay is <b>not</b> "fuzzy" (it will never take up to another 0.<small>25</small> seconds) and so will never correctly sync up with <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Sheen" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" <div style="padding:0.5em 1em;">
<ul><li>Due to the critical strike rolling behavior affecting both of <i>The Darkin Glaive's</i> first cast's attacks with the same outcome, <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Sundered Sky" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sundered_Sky" title="An icon for the item Sundered Sky"><img alt="An icon for the item Sundered Sky" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sundered_Sky_item.png/20px-Sundered_Sky_item.png?50a35" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sundered_Sky_item.png/40px-Sundered_Sky_item.png?50a35 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Sundered_Sky" title="Sundered Sky">Sundered Sky</a></span></span> may synergize greatly with its effect when ready.<div style="clear:both"></div></li></ul>
</div><p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>

<ul><li><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell shield"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Spell_shield" title="An icon representing the keyword Spell shield"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Spell shield" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/20px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/40px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Spell_shield" title="Spell shield">Spell shield</a></span> will block both passes, as well as the second one individually if circumstances permit.</li>
<li><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Projectile"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="An icon representing the keyword Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Projectile" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/20px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/40px-Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="Projectile">Intercepting</a></span> the initial projectile will instantly trigger <i>Dreaded Return's</i> pull.</li>
<li><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Displacement immunity"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity" title="An icon representing the keyword Displacement immune"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Displacement immune" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/20px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/40px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity" title="Crowd control">Displacement immunity</a></span> will <b>not</b> resist the application of the <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Stun"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stun" title="An icon representing the keyword Stun"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Stun" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/20px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/40px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stun" class="mw-redirect" title="Stun">stun</a></span>.</li>
<li>The projectile is shown on the minimap and <i>Dreaded Return</i> can be cast targeting the minimap.</li>
<li>This ability will cast from wherever the caster is at the end of the cast time.</li>

<ul><li><i>Aureate Rush</i> has no minimum dash range.</li></ul>
<ul><li>If the dash is interrupted, <b>Zaahen</b> will fail to deal damage.
<ul><li><b>Zaahen</b> will, however, deal damage if the dash is interrupted at the very end, shortly before the damage would occur. <a target="_blank" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" class="external autonumber" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qQNuoySpVMc&t=303s">[1]</a> <sup><span class="basic-tooltip" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;" title="This is not intended.">(bug)</span></sup></li></ul></li>
<li>The mixed damage is applied in two instances, and the <span style="color: #FF8C34; white-space:normal">physical damage</span> will be dealt first within the same game tick.
<ul><li>If the <span style="color: #FF8C34; white-space:normal">physical damage</span> finishes off the unit, the <span style="color: #00B0F0; white-space:normal">magic damage</span> will not be dealt against it.<sup><span class="basic-tooltip" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;" title="This is not intended.">(bug)</span></sup></li></ul></li>
<li>The following table refers for interactions while <b>Zaahen</b> is dashing:</li></ul>

<ul><li>The lockout, damage reduction, and displacement immunity may last for up to an additional 0.<small>25</small> seconds after the slam due to fuzziness.<sup><span class="basic-tooltip" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;" title="This does not match expectations.">(unexpected)</span></sup></li>
<li>The healing per champion is equal to 33% of the damage numbers, <b>not</b> the damage dealt.<sup><span class="basic-tooltip" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;" title="This does not match expectations.">(unexpected)</span></sup></li>
<li><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell shield"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Spell_shield" title="An icon representing the keyword Spell shield"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Spell shield" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/20px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/40px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Spell_shield" title="Spell shield">Spell shield</a></span> will block the damage but not the heal.<sup><span class="basic-tooltip" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;" title="This does not match expectations.">(unexpected)</span></sup></li>
<li>If <b>Zaahen</b> <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Blinks"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blink" title="An icon representing the keyword Blink"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Blink" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/20px-Flash.png?3cd4f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/40px-Flash.png?3cd4f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Blink" title="Blink">blinks</a></span> or has his dash otherwise interrupted while ascending into the air, <i>Grim Deliverance's</i> effects are canceled; he will not slam the ground and will not update his animations correctly, additionally, he will be able to move during the lockout.<sup><span class="basic-tooltip" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;" title="This is not intended.">(bug)</span></sup></li>
<li>If <b>Zaahen</b> moves during the 0.<small>6</small>-second delay, he will slam down at his new location despite the indicator not moving.<sup><span class="basic-tooltip" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;" title="This is not intended.">(bug)</span></sup></li>
<li><b>Zaahen</b> will transition from having <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cc-immune"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immunity" title="An icon representing the keyword Cc-Immune"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cc-Immune" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cc-immune_icon.png/20px-Cc-immune_icon.png?85815" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Cc-immune_icon.png/40px-Cc-immune_icon.png?85815 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immunity" title="Crowd control">total crowd control immunity</a></span> during the cast time, to having <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Displacement immunity"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity" title="An icon representing the keyword Displacement immune"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Displacement immune" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/20px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/40px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity" title="Crowd control">displacement immunity</a></span> during the dash and the slam delay.</li>
<li>The following table refers for interactions while <b>Zaahen</b> is in cast time and during the lockout:</li></ul>

<li>The <span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/File:Seneschal_Seal_profileicon.jpg" class="mw-file-description"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Seneschal_Seal_profileicon.jpg/20px-Seneschal_Seal_profileicon.jpg?72b0c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Seneschal_Seal_profileicon.jpg/40px-Seneschal_Seal_profileicon.jpg?72b0c 2x" data-file-width="300" data-file-height="300"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/File:Seneschal_Seal_profileicon.jpg" title="File:Seneschal Seal profileicon.jpg">Seneschal Seal</a> icon from <a href="/en-us/V25.17" title="V25.17">Trials of Twilight: Act 1</a> foreshadowed his silhouette during <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Zaahen" data-ability="Grim Deliverance" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Zaahen#Grim_Deliverance" title="An icon for Zaahen's ability Grim Deliverance"><img alt="An icon for Zaahen's ability Grim Deliverance" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Grim_Deliverance.png/20px-Zaahen_Grim_Deliverance.png?6be08" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Grim_Deliverance.png/40px-Zaahen_Grim_Deliverance.png?6be08 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Grim_Deliverance">Grim Deliverance</a></span></span>.</li></ul>

<li>Bonus AD ratio reduced to <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">20 / 25 / 30 / 35 / 40% <b>bonus</b> AD</span> from <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">20 / 30 / 40 / 50 / 60%</span>.</li>
<li>Recast bonus AD ratio reduced to <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">20 / 25 / 30 / 35 / 40% <b>bonus</b> AD</span> from <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">20 / 30 / 40 / 50 / 60%</span>.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Zaahen" data-ability="Aureate Rush" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Zaahen#Aureate_Rush" title="An icon for Zaahen's ability Aureate Rush"><img alt="An icon for Zaahen's ability Aureate Rush" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Aureate_Rush.png/20px-Zaahen_Aureate_Rush.png?dd046" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Aureate_Rush.png/40px-Zaahen_Aureate_Rush.png?dd046 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Aureate_Rush">Aureate Rush</a></span></span>

<ul><li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Bug Fix:</b></span> Amended multiple issues during the resurrection.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Zaahen" data-ability="The Darkin Glaive" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Zaahen#The_Darkin_Glaive" title="An icon for Zaahen's ability The Darkin Glaive"><img alt="An icon for Zaahen's ability The Darkin Glaive" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_The_Darkin_Glaive.png/20px-Zaahen_The_Darkin_Glaive.png?d12cf" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_The_Darkin_Glaive.png/40px-Zaahen_The_Darkin_Glaive.png?d12cf 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#The_Darkin_Glaive">The Darkin Glaive</a></span></span>
<ul><li>Cooldown increased to 10 / 9 / 8 / 7 / 6 seconds from 9 / 8 / 7 / 6 / 5.</li>
<li>Monster damage increased to 175% from 150%.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Undocumented / Bug Fix:</b></span> Cooldown is now affected by basic ability haste.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Zaahen" data-ability="Aureate Rush" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Zaahen#Aureate_Rush" title="An icon for Zaahen's ability Aureate Rush"><img alt="An icon for Zaahen's ability Aureate Rush" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Aureate_Rush.png/20px-Zaahen_Aureate_Rush.png?dd046" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Aureate_Rush.png/40px-Zaahen_Aureate_Rush.png?dd046 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Aureate_Rush">Aureate Rush</a></span></span>
<ul><li>Sweet spot magic damage reduced to <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">4 / 4.<small>5</small> / 5 / 5.<small>5</small> / 6% of target's <b>maximum</b> health</span> from <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">4 / 5 / 6 / 7 / 8%</span>.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Zaahen" data-ability="Grim Deliverance" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Zaahen#Grim_Deliverance" title="An icon for Zaahen's ability Grim Deliverance"><img alt="An icon for Zaahen's ability Grim Deliverance" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Grim_Deliverance.png/20px-Zaahen_Grim_Deliverance.png?6be08" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Grim_Deliverance.png/40px-Zaahen_Grim_Deliverance.png?6be08 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Grim_Deliverance">Grim Deliverance</a></span></span>
<ul><li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Undocumented / Removed:</b></span> No longer retains the <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cc-immune"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immunity" title="An icon representing the keyword Cc-Immune"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cc-Immune" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cc-immune_icon.png/20px-Cc-immune_icon.png?85815" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Cc-immune_icon.png/40px-Cc-immune_icon.png?85815 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immunity" title="Crowd control">crowd control immunity</a></span> during the dash and the slam delay once the cast time completes.</li>

position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Critically strike"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Critical_strike" title="An icon representing the keyword Critical strike"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Critical strike" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/20px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/40px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f 2x" data-file-width="144" data-file-height="144"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Critical_strike" title="Critical strike">critically strike</a></span> for<span id="container" class="container" style="cursor:help;"><span class="flipText1 active">「 <span style="color: #B4814C; white-space:normal">50% <b>bonus</b> critical damage</span></span> 」</span></span><span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">AD</span> <span style="color: #FF8C34; white-space:normal"><b>bonus</b> physical damage</span>.</li>
<li>After 1.<small>5</small> seconds of using the empowered attack, <i>The Darkin Glaive</i> can be recast within the next 5 seconds at no additional cost, modifying it with a new effect.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Recast:</b></span> <b>Zaahen</b> empowers his next basic attack within 5 seconds to have an <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Uncancellable windup"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack#Uncancellable_Windup" title="An icon representing the keyword Uncancellable windup"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Uncancellable windup" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Vi_Relentless_Force_2.png/20px-Vi_Relentless_Force_2.png?9f7e9" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Vi_Relentless_Force_2.png/40px-Vi_Relentless_Force_2.png?9f7e9 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack#Uncancellable_Windup" title="Basic attack">uncancellable windup</a></span>, gain <span style="color:inherit; <li><span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Urf" title="An icon representing Urf"><img alt="An icon representing Urf" src="/en-us/images/thumb/UrfSquare.png/20px-UrfSquare.png?6d852" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/UrfSquare.png/40px-UrfSquare.png?6d852 2x" data-file-width="133" data-file-height="137"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Urf" class="mw-redirect" title="Urf">Urf</a></span></span></li>
<li><span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Well" title="An icon representing Well"><img alt="An icon representing Well" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Well_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Well_OriginalSquare.png?d96f0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Well_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Well_OriginalSquare.png?d96f0 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Well" title="Well">Well</a></span></span></li></ul>
</div>
</td></tr>
</tbody></table></div>
</div><div class="hidden-metadata navigation-not-searchable"><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Attack windup</span></div>
The <b>attack windup</b> is a portion of the <span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/File:Basic_Attack.png" class="mw-file-description"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/20px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/40px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attack</a> animation that must play out in order to launch it. For <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Projectile"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="An icon representing the keyword Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Projectile" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/20px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/40px-Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="Projectile">projectile</a></span> basic attacks, the windup usually aligns with drawing the projectile on-screen.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The attack windup is displayed as a percentage, and any windup modifier is listed as a decimal next to it.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Attack speed ratio</span></div>
<p>The <b>Attack speed ratio (AS ratio)</b> adjusts the effectiveness of bonus AS from all sources. It is usually equal to the unit's base AS (level 1 with no bonuses), but tuning to a higher or lower relative value translates to more or less bonus AS received compared to other units with the same base AS. 
</p>
<center><big>Total AS = Base AS + Bonus AS × <span style="color: #D929D9; white-space:normal"><b>AS Ratio</b></span></big><br><i>(All values in decimal form)</i></center><hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The ingame stats HUD displays the <b>AS ratio</b> instead of base AS to communicate this comparative effectiveness. The Wiki opts to always list both stats and show the <b>AS ratio</b> as "N/A" if the two are equal.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gameplay_radius.png/44px-Gameplay_radius.png?ee4af" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Gameplay_radius.png?ee4af 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Gameplay radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>gameplay radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that most closely resembles the concept of a 'hitbox', and is the radius used for <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Edge range"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="An icon representing the keyword Edge range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range">edge range</a></span> effects, which include <a href="/en-us/Basic_attacks" class="mw-redirect" title="Basic attacks">basic attacks</a>, <a href="/en-us/Direction-targeted" class="mw-redirect" title="Direction-targeted">line collision missiles</a>, rectangular AOEs, and others. The gameplay radius determines the reach of both incoming and outgoing effects: for example, enemies are within a unit's <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> basic attack range</span> based on the edge of their gameplay radius and vice versa.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Selection_radius.png/44px-Selection_radius.png?7345c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Selection_radius.png?7345c 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Selection radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>selection radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the horizontally furthest point from the center of their model that other players' cursor is allowed to be, while still maintaining the ability to select that unit.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Pathing_radius.png/44px-Pathing_radius.png?ee4af" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Pathing_radius.png?ee4af 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Pathing radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>pathing radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the gameplay area they occupy for unit-collision and pathfinding logic. A unit's center cannot intersect with another unit's <b>pathing radius</b>, unless one of them is <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ghosted"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Unit_collision" title="An icon representing the keyword Ghosted"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ghosted" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ghost.png/20px-Ghost.png?ee615" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ghost.png/40px-Ghost.png?ee615 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Unit_collision" title="Unit collision">ghosted</a></span>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Selection_height.png/44px-Selection_height.png?8e760" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="43" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Selection_height.png?8e760 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="71"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Selection height</span></div>
A unit's <b>selection height</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the vertically furthest point from the center of their model at the ground that other players' cursor is allowed to be, while still maintaining the ability to select that unit.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Gameplay in <a href="/en-us/League_of_Legends" title="League of Legends">League of Legends</a> takes place in two dimensions no matter the visuals. However, a virtual <i>height</i> dimension that is perpendicular to the ground creates the game's three-dimensional view, which in combination with the camera's perspective necessitates the usage of the <b>selection height</b>.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Acquisition_range.png/44px-Acquisition_range.png?72c63" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Acquisition_range.png?72c63 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Acquisition radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>acquisition range</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the distance at which they will acquire <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attack</a></span> targets when a target unit is not specified by the player.
</p>
<ul><li>Auto-attacking <i>automatically</i> orders an idle champion to acquire enemies within this range. This can be disabled in the <a href="/en-us/Settings" title="Settings">Settings</a>.</li>
<li>Attack-move commands scan for targets within this range while moving toward a given location.</li></ul>
<p><b>Acquisition range</b> is calculated from the champion's <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Er"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="An icon representing the keyword Edge range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span></span> edge to the edge of other units.<br>
<span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:inherit; white-space:normal">Attack range</span></span> bonuses modify the champion's <b>acquisition range</b> by the same amount.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Top_icon.png/44px-Top_icon.png?58442" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Top_icon.png/88px-Top_icon.png?58442 2x" data-file-width="136" data-file-height="136"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Top</span></div>
<p>Within a <a href="/en-us/Drafted_team" class="mw-redirect" title="Drafted team">drafted team</a>, the <i>Top Laner</i> is the champion assigned to the top lane.
</p>
<p>
<span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Juggernaut"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Juggernaut_(Class)" title="An icon representing the keyword Juggernaut"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Juggernaut" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/20px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/40px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Juggernaut_(Class)" class="mw-redirect" title="Juggernaut (Class)">Juggernauts</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Diver"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Diver" title="An icon representing the keyword Diver"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Diver" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/20px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/40px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Diver" class="mw-redirect" title="Diver">Divers</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Battlemage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Battlemage" title="An icon representing the keyword Battlemage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Battlemage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Mage_icon.png/20px-Mage_icon.png?c4c84" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Mage_icon.png/40px-Mage_icon.png?c4c84 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Battlemage" class="mw-redirect" title="Battlemage">Battlemages</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Skirmisher"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Skirmisher" title="An icon representing the keyword Skirmisher"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Skirmisher" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slayer_icon.png/20px-Slayer_icon.png?dde86" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Slayer_icon.png/40px-Slayer_icon.png?dde86 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Skirmisher" class="mw-redirect" title="Skirmisher">Skirmishers</a></span>, and <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; font-weight: bold;">Jungle</span></div>
<p>Within a <a href="/en-us/Drafted_team" class="mw-redirect" title="Drafted team">drafted team</a>, the <i>Jungler</i> is the champion assigned to the jungle. A <i>Jungler</i> needs to be able to <a href="/en-us/Jungling" title="Jungling">clear jungle camps</a> without too much difficulty and ambush other champions in lane.
</p>
<p>
<span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Diver"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Diver" title="An icon representing the keyword Diver"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Diver" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/20px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/40px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Diver" class="mw-redirect" title="Diver">Divers</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slayer_icon.png/44px-Slayer_icon.png?dde86" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Slayer_icon.png/88px-Slayer_icon.png?dde86 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Skirmisher</span></div>
<i>Slayers</i> (formerly "Assassins") are fragile but agile damage-focused melee champions that look to swiftly take down their targets.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<i>Skirmishers</i> (also known as Duelists) aim to shred through any nearby enemy that approaches. Because Skirmishers lack high-end burst damage or reliable ways of closing in on high-priority targets, they are instead armed with situationally powerful defensive tools to survive in the fray, along with extreme sustained damage to cut down even the most durable targets.</p>
<p class="mw-empty-elt">
</p><dl><dt>Examples</dt></dl>
