vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/44px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/88px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Fighter (Legacy)</span></div>
<b>Fighters</b> are durable and damage-focused melee champions that look to be in the thick of combat.

</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slayer_icon.png/44px-Slayer_icon.png?dde86" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Slayer_icon.png/88px-Slayer_icon.png?dde86 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Assassin (Legacy)</span></div>
<p><b>Assassins</b> are fragile but agile damage-focused melee champions that look to swiftly take down their targets.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Mana_resource.png/44px-Mana_resource.png?5be85" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Mana_resource.png/88px-Mana_resource.png?5be85 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Mana</span></div>
<p><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Mana" title="Mana"><img src="/en-us/images/Mana_icon.svg?d5eaf" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <b>Mana</b></span> (also known as <b>MP</b>) is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that is the resource of many <a href="/en-us/Champion" title="Champion">champions</a> necessary to cast most of their <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a>. Mana can be restored via <a href="/en-us/Mana_regeneration" title="Mana regeneration">mana regeneration</a> and some <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a>, <a href="/en-us/Item" title="Item">items</a>, <a href="/en-us/Rune" title="Rune">runes</a>, and <a href="/en-us/Buff" title="Buff">buffs</a>.<br><br><b>Mana</b> is represented in-game by the blue bar within the HUD, indicating the champion's <b>current</b> mana and <b>maximum</b> mana. <b>Current</b> mana is reduced by expenditure through paying an ability's mana <i>cost</i>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/44px-Melee_role.png?166b1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/88px-Melee_role.png?166b1 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Melee</span></div>
<p><b>Melee</b> champions have a basic attack <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> range</span> usually within 200 units. A melee attack does not use a projectile to deal damage, therefore not subject to effects that mitigate projectiles, like <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Yasuo" data-ability="Wind Wall" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Yasuo#Wind_Wall" title="An icon for Yasuo's ability Wind Wall"><img alt="An icon for Yasuo's ability Wind Wall" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png/20px-Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png?0ffbb" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png/40px-Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png?0ffbb 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Yasuo#Wind_Wall" title="Yasuo">Wind Wall</a></span></span>. Some champions can shift between a ranged and melee form, and certain items/runes differ for melee characters.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/44px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Basic attack</span></div>
The <b>basic attack</b> (or "auto") is the default means by which a unit deals damage, usually equaling <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_damage" title="Attack damage"><img src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage_icon.svg?51c73" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">100% AD</span></span> <span style="color: #FF8C34; white-space:normal">physical damage</span>. <b>Basic attacks</b> are normally unit-targeted <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Edge range"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="An icon representing the keyword Edge range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range">edge range</a></span> spells, and the <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> attack range</span> stat determines their reach.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The caster must stand still to complete a brief <i>windup</i> before launching a <b>basic attack</b>. Depending on the caster:
</p><ul><li>If a caster's attacks are non-projectile (e.g. <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Melee"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Melee" title="An icon representing the keyword Melee"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Melee" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/20px-Melee_role.png?166b1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/40px-Melee_role.png?166b1 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Melee" class="mw-redirect" title="Melee">melee</a></span>) launching the attack deals damage immediately.</li>
<li>If a caster's attacks are <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Projectile"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="An icon representing the keyword Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Projectile" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/20px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/40px-Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="Projectile">projectile</a></span>, launching the attack sends a projectile that follows the target and deals damage upon striking them.</li></ul>
The caster then incurs a brief cooldown, based on their <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_speed" title="Attack speed"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Attack_speed_icon.png/15px-Attack_speed_icon.png?50a17" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Attack_speed_icon.png/30px-Attack_speed_icon.png?50a17 2x" data-file-width="56" data-file-height="56"></a></span> <span style="color: #F5EE99; white-space:normal">attack speed</span></span>. Basic attacks' damage may trigger <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Proc damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage" title="An icon representing the keyword Proc damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Proc damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/20px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/40px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage" title="Damage">on-hit effects</a></span> only upon dealing damage. <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="On-attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Attacking" title="An icon representing the keyword On-attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword On-attack" src="/en-us/images/On-attack_icon.svg?88ec8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="512" data-file-height="512"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Attacking" title="Attack effects">On-attack</a></span> effects will always trigger upon the attack's <i>windup</i> completing.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Champion_ability.svg?8f232" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Champion ability</span></div>
A <b>champion ability</b> (often just <b>ability</b>) is a unique action performed by and only available to a specific <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Champion"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion" title="An icon representing the keyword Champion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/20px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/40px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0 2x" data-file-width="200" data-file-height="200"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion" title="Champion">champion</a></span>. All of these special moves available to a champion collectively constitute their <i>kit</i>. A skill point is earned each time the champion <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Experience_(champion)" title="Experience (champion)"><img src="/en-us/images/Experience_icon.svg?219bd" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="18" data-file-height="18"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Experience_(champion)" title="Experience (champion)">levels up</a></span>, which the player can spend on most abilities to learn them and rank them up to improve their potency.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<b>Champion abilities</b> can have either or both <i>active</i> and <i>passive</i> effects:
</p><ul><li>Active effects are <i>cast</i> by using their respective <a href="/en-us/Hotkey" class="mw-redirect" title="Hotkey">hotkey</a> and selecting a valid target. Most abilities require spending an amount of <a href="/en-us/Ability_resource" title="Ability resource">resource</a>, such as <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Mana" title="Mana"><img src="/en-us/images/Mana_icon.svg?d5eaf" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color: #0099CC; white-space:normal">mana</span></span>.</li>
<li>Passive effects may simply be permanently available or are <i>cast</i> by fulfilling a requirement or using a specific command.</li></ul>
Most abilities incur a <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Cooldown" title="Cooldown"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cooldown_icon.png/15px-Cooldown_icon.png?50d14" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Cooldown_icon.png?50d14 2x" data-file-width="20" data-file-height="20"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Cooldown" title="Cooldown">cooldown</a></span> after being cast, during which they cannot be used. This cooldown time is usually reduced by <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_haste" title="Ability haste"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cooldown_reduction_icon.png/15px-Cooldown_reduction_icon.png?27276" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Cooldown_reduction_icon.png/30px-Cooldown_reduction_icon.png?27276 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color: #7ADECD; white-space:normal">ability haste</span></span>. <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects" title="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects" title="Ability effects">Spell effects</a></span> may trigger only when a valid ability deals damage. On-cast effects trigger upon an ability's <i>cast time</i> completing.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/44px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/88px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0 2x" data-file-width="200" data-file-height="200"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Champion</span></div>
<p><b>Champions</b> are the player-controlled characters in <a href="/en-us/League_of_Legends" title="League of Legends">League of Legends</a>. Each champion possesses unique abilities and <a href="/en-us/Champion_attributes" class="mw-redirect" title="Champion attributes">attributes</a>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Stack_icon.png?2cff8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="36" data-file-height="36"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Stack</span></div>
A <b>stack</b> refers to a <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Buff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Buff" title="An icon representing the keyword Buff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Buff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Promote.png/20px-Promote.png?7b9a4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Promote.png/40px-Promote.png?7b9a4 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Buff" title="Buff">buff</a></span> or <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Debuff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="An icon representing the keyword Debuff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Debuff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/20px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/40px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="Debuff">debuff</a></span> that can be increased in count under certain circumstances. Stacking effects with durations will refresh per instance, unless otherwise stated.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Stacking effects that time out may cause all stacks to expire at once or one by one in given intervals, depending on the source.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Revival_icon.png/44px-Revival_icon.png?4c111" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Revival_icon.png?4c111 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Resurrection</span></div>
A unit that is protected by <b>Resurrection</b> will enter a revival state and <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dispel"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="An icon representing the keyword Dispel"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dispel" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Anivia_Rebirth.png/20px-Anivia_Rebirth.png?e5074" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Anivia_Rebirth.png/40px-Anivia_Rebirth.png?e5074 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="Debuff">dispel</a></span> most <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Debuff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="An icon representing the keyword Debuff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Debuff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/20px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/40px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="Debuff">debuffs</a></span> upon taking <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Death"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Death" title="An icon representing the keyword Death"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Death" src="/en-us/images/Death_icon.svg?70f06" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="52" data-file-height="52"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Death" title="Death">fatal damage</a></span>. After the state completes, the unit is revived. <b>Resurrection</b> effects do not count for kills or assists.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<b>Resurrection</b> sources have a hierarchy, and will trigger in the following order:
</p><ol><li><span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Zilean" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Zilean" title="An icon representing Zilean"><img alt="An icon representing Zilean" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Zilean_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Zilean_OriginalSquare.png?f0cc9" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zilean_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Zilean_OriginalSquare.png?f0cc9 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Zilean" title="Zilean">Zilean's</a></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Zilean" data-ability="Chronoshift" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Zilean#Chronoshift" title="An icon for Zilean's ability Chronoshift"><img alt="An icon for Zilean's ability Chronoshift" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Zilean_Chronoshift.png/20px-Zilean_Chronoshift.png?9d0ad" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zilean_Chronoshift.png/40px-Zilean_Chronoshift.png?9d0ad 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Zilean#Chronoshift" title="Zilean">Chronoshift</a></span></span></span></li>
<li><span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Zaahen" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><span title="An icon representing Zaahen"><img alt="An icon representing Zaahen" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Zaahen_OriginalSquare.png?aabf2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Zaahen_OriginalSquare.png?aabf2 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></span></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><strong class="selflink">Zaahen's</strong></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Zaahen" data-ability="Cultivation of War" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Zaahen#Cultivation_of_War" title="An icon for Zaahen's ability Cultivation of War"><img alt="An icon for Zaahen's ability Cultivation of War" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Cultivation_of_War.png/20px-Zaahen_Cultivation_of_War.png?bff60" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zaahen_Cultivation_of_War.png/40px-Zaahen_Cultivation_of_War.png?bff60 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Cultivation_of_War">Cultivation of War</a></span></span></span></li>
<li><span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Guardian Angel" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Guardian_Angel" title="An icon for the item Guardian Angel"><img alt="An icon for the item Guardian Angel" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Guardian_Angel_item.png/20px-Guardian_Angel_item.png?da4ce" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Guardian_Angel_item.png/40px-Guardian_Angel_item.png?da4ce 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Guardian_Angel" title="Guardian Angel">Guardian Angel</a></span></span></li>
<li><span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Anivia" data-skin="Original" Division" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Zac#Cell_Division" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zac_Cell_Division.png/40px-Zac_Cell_Division.png?847d7 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Zac#Cell_Division" title="Zac">Cell Division</a></span></span></span></li></ol>

<b>Resurrection</b> will always take precedence over <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Zombie state"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Death#Zombie_states" title="An icon representing the keyword Zombie state"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Zombie state" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Zombie_icon.png/20px-Zombie_icon.png?e263b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zombie_icon.png/40px-Zombie_icon.png?e263b 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Death#Zombie_states" title="Death">zombie state</a></span> effects. Entering <b>resurrection</b> does not cancel cast times. <span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Renata Glasc" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Renata_Glasc" title="An icon representing Renata Glasc"><img alt="An icon representing Renata Glasc" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Renata_Glasc_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Renata_Glasc_OriginalSquare.png?1300f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Renata_Glasc_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Renata_Glasc_OriginalSquare.png?1300f 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Renata_Glasc" title="Renata Glasc">Renata Glasc's</a></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Renata Glasc" data-ability="Bailout" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Renata_Glasc#Bailout" title="An icon for Renata Glasc's ability Bailout"><img alt="An icon for Renata Glasc's ability Bailout" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Renata_Glasc_Bailout.png/20px-Renata_Glasc_Bailout.png?39be5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Renata_Glasc_Bailout.png/40px-Renata_Glasc_Bailout.png?39be5 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Renata_Glasc#Bailout" title="Renata Glasc">Bailout</a></span></span></span> always takes priority over <b>resurrection</b>.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Heal_power_icon.svg?42353" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Heal</span></div>
<p><b>Healing</b> replenishes a unit's <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Health" title="Health"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Health_icon.png/15px-Health_icon.png?f8c57" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Health_icon.png/30px-Health_icon.png?f8c57 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal"><b>current</b> health</span></span>, but never above their <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal"><b>maximum</b> health</span>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Stack_icon.png?2cff8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="36" data-file-height="36"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Stack</span></div>
A <b>stack</b> refers to a <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Buff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Buff" title="An icon representing the keyword Buff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Buff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Promote.png/20px-Promote.png?7b9a4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Promote.png/40px-Promote.png?7b9a4 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Buff" title="Buff">buff</a></span> or <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Debuff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="An icon representing the keyword Debuff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Debuff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/20px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/40px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="Debuff">debuff</a></span> that can be increased in count under certain circumstances. Stacking effects with durations will refresh per instance, unless otherwise stated.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Stacking effects that time out may cause all stacks to expire at once or one by one in given intervals, depending on the source.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/44px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/88px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0 2x" data-file-width="200" data-file-height="200"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Champion</span></div>
<p><b>Champions</b> are the player-controlled characters in <a href="/en-us/League_of_Legends" title="League of Legends">League of Legends</a>. Each champion possesses unique abilities and <a href="/en-us/Champion_attributes" class="mw-redirect" title="Champion attributes">attributes</a>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Death_icon.svg?70f06" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="52" data-file-height="52"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Death</span></div>
<b>Death</b> occurs when a unit's <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Health" title="Health"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Health_icon.png/15px-Health_icon.png?f8c57" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Health_icon.png/30px-Health_icon.png?f8c57 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> health</span> is reduced to zero, thereby being killed. The unit can no longer act and is removed or becomes a corpse.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
On player death, they can view the <a href="/en-us/Death_recap" class="mw-redirect" title="Death recap">death recap</a> and the <a href="/en-us/Shop" title="Shop">shop</a> to purchase items, and some <a href="/en-us/Active_ability_items" title="Active ability items">item actives</a> can be used while dead.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png/44px-Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png?a8ab9" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png?a8ab9 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Invulnerability</span></div>
<p>A unit that is <b>Invulnerable</b> reduces all damage taken to <b>0</b> and prevents effects that trigger from damage.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/44px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Untargetable_icon.png?c022c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Untargetable</span></div>
A unit that is <b>untargetable</b> is an invalid target; it can neither be <a href="/en-us/Unit_selection" title="Unit selection">selected</a> nor hit by most effects. Effects that have already been applied are <b>not</b> invalidated by the unit becoming untargetable, unless they are special-cased to do so.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Becoming untargetable will interrupt acqusition. This also causes non-champions to lose <a href="/en-us/Terminology#Aggro" title="Terminology">aggro</a>. Many untargetabilities additionally <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Homing projectile destruction"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="An icon representing the keyword Homing projectile destruction"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Homing projectile destruction" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Bullet_strikethrough.png/20px-Bullet_strikethrough.png?5a522" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Bullet_strikethrough.png/40px-Bullet_strikethrough.png?5a522 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="Projectile">destroy</a></span> all incoming <a href="/en-us/Unit-targeted" class="mw-redirect" title="Unit-targeted">unit-targeted</a> <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Projectiles"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="An icon representing the keyword Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Projectile" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/20px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/40px-Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="Projectile">projectiles</a></span>.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Lockout_icon_2.png?5e81e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="44" data-file-height="44"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Lockout</span></div>
A champion that is <i>locked out</i> is unable to perform certain actions such as casting abilities, moving, or attacking due to currently performing another action that must complete. The prevented actions can vary per instance.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Lockout does not interact with <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control" title="Crowd control">crowd control</a> mechanics unless otherwise stated.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style="width:500px;box-sizing:content-box;">

vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/44px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Untargetable_icon.png?c022c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Untargetable</span></div>
A unit that is <b>untargetable</b> is an invalid target; it can neither be <a href="/en-us/Unit_selection" title="Unit selection">selected</a> nor hit by most effects. Effects that have already been applied are <b>not</b> invalidated by the unit becoming untargetable, unless they are special-cased to do so.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Becoming untargetable will interrupt acqusition. This also causes non-champions to lose <a href="/en-us/Terminology#Aggro" title="Terminology">aggro</a>. Many untargetabilities additionally <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Homing projectile destruction"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="An icon representing the keyword Homing projectile destruction"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Homing projectile destruction" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Bullet_strikethrough.png/20px-Bullet_strikethrough.png?5a522" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Bullet_strikethrough.png/40px-Bullet_strikethrough.png?5a522 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="Projectile">destroy</a></span> all incoming <a href="/en-us/Unit-targeted" class="mw-redirect" title="Unit-targeted">unit-targeted</a> <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Projectiles"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="An icon representing the keyword Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Projectile" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/20px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/40px-Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="Projectile">projectiles</a></span>.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Bullet_strikethrough.png/44px-Bullet_strikethrough.png?5a522" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Bullet_strikethrough.png/88px-Bullet_strikethrough.png?5a522 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Homing projectile destruction</span></div>
<b>Destroying</b> or <b>popping of a projectile</b> references an effect that destroys all homing <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Projectile"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="An icon representing the keyword Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Projectile" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/20px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/40px-Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="Projectile">missiles</a></span> currently targeting a specific unit, such as ranged projectile-based <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attacks</a>. Destroyed missiles will do the same thing as if they were destroyed by <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Yasuo" data-ability="Wind Wall" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Yasuo#Wind_Wall" title="An icon for Yasuo's ability Wind Wall"><img alt="An icon for Yasuo's ability Wind Wall" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png/20px-Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png?0ffbb" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png/40px-Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png?0ffbb 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Yasuo#Wind_Wall" title="Yasuo">Wind Wall</a></span></span> or <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Samira" data-ability="Blade Whirl" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Samira#Blade_Whirl" title="An icon for Samira's ability Blade Whirl"><img alt="An icon for Samira's ability Blade Whirl" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Samira_Blade_Whirl.png/20px-Samira_Blade_Whirl.png?c0171" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Samira_Blade_Whirl.png/40px-Samira_Blade_Whirl.png?c0171 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Samira#Blade_Whirl" title="Samira">Blade Whirl</a></span></span> (usually vanishing without any effect).<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The following abilities perform one or more <b>projectile popping events</b>:
</p><ul><li><i>Most</i> abilities and effects that grant <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Untargetability"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Untargetable" title="An icon representing the keyword Untargetable"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Untargetable" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/20px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/40px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Untargetable" class="mw-redirect" title="Untargetable">untargetability</a></span> pop projectiles when the unit gains the status effect.
<ul><li><span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Master Yi" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Master_Yi" title="An icon representing Master Yi"><img alt="An icon representing Master Yi" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Master_Yi_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Master_Yi_OriginalSquare.png?3d56a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Master_Yi_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Master_Yi_OriginalSquare.png?3d56a 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Master_Yi" title="Master Yi">Master Yi's</a></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Master Yi" data-ability="Alpha Strike" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Master_Yi#Alpha_Strike" title="An icon for Master Yi's ability Alpha Strike"><img alt="An icon for Master Yi's ability Alpha Strike" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Master_Yi_Alpha_Strike.png/20px-Master_Yi_Alpha_Strike.png?80b5d" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Master_Yi_Alpha_Strike.png/40px-Master_Yi_Alpha_Strike.png?80b5d 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Master_Yi#Alpha_Strike" title="Master Yi">Alpha Strike</a></span></span></span> in particular pops targeted projectiles on each game tick for its duration.</li>
<li><span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Gwen" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Gwen" title="An icon representing Gwen"><img alt="An icon representing Gwen" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gwen_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Gwen_OriginalSquare.png?794a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Gwen_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Gwen_OriginalSquare.png?794a1 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Gwen" title="Gwen">Gwen's</a></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Gwen" data-ability="Hallowed Mist" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Gwen#Hallowed_Mist" title="An icon for Gwen's ability Hallowed Mist"><img alt="An icon for Gwen's ability Hallowed Mist" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gwen_Hallowed_Mist.png/20px-Gwen_Hallowed_Mist.png?ec9f6" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Gwen_Hallowed_Mist.png/40px-Gwen_Hallowed_Mist.png?ec9f6 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Gwen#Hallowed_Mist" title="Gwen">Hallowed Mist</a></span></span></span> pops all projectiles (from enemy champions outside of its area of effect) targeted at her that attempt to pass through or be inside its area of effect.</li></ul></li>
<li>Upon entering or leaving <span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Mordekaiser" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Mordekaiser" title="An icon representing Mordekaiser"><img alt="An icon representing Mordekaiser" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Mordekaiser_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Mordekaiser_OriginalSquare.png?76c25" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Mordekaiser_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Mordekaiser_OriginalSquare.png?76c25 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Mordekaiser" title="Mordekaiser">Mordekaiser's</a></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Mordekaiser" data-ability="Realm of Death" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Mordekaiser#Realm_of_Death" title="An icon for Mordekaiser's ability Realm of Death"><img alt="An icon for Mordekaiser's ability Realm of Death" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Mordekaiser_Realm_of_Death.png/20px-Mordekaiser_Realm_of_Death.png?9696f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Mordekaiser_Realm_of_Death.png/40px-Mordekaiser_Realm_of_Death.png?9696f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Mordekaiser#Realm_of_Death" title="Mordekaiser">Realm of Death</a></span></span></span>.</li>
<li>Upon successfully completing the <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Channel"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Channel" title="An icon representing the keyword Channel"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Channel" src="/en-us/images/Channeling_icon.svg?d2ab8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Channel" title="Channel">channel</a></span> of:
<ul><li><span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Shen" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Shen" title="An icon representing Shen"><img alt="An icon representing Shen" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Shen_OriginalSquare.png?7795f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Shen_OriginalSquare.png?7795f 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Shen" title="Shen">Shen's</a></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Shen" data-ability="Stand United" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Shen#Stand_United" title="An icon for Shen's ability Stand United"><img alt="An icon for Shen's ability Stand United" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Stand_United.png/20px-Shen_Stand_United.png?b107c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Stand_United.png/40px-Shen_Stand_United.png?b107c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Shen#Stand_United" title="Shen">Stand United</a></span></span></span></li>
<li><span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Twisted Fate" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Twisted_Fate" title="An icon representing Twisted Fate"><img alt="An icon representing Twisted Fate" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Twisted_Fate_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Twisted_Fate_OriginalSquare.png?72748" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Twisted_Fate_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Twisted_Fate_OriginalSquare.png?72748 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Twisted_Fate" title="Twisted Fate">Twisted Fate's</a></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Twisted Fate" data-ability="Gate" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Twisted_Fate#Gate" title="An icon for Twisted Fate's ability Gate"><img alt="An icon for Twisted Fate's ability Gate" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Twisted_Fate_Gate.png/20px-Twisted_Fate_Gate.png?85105" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Twisted_Fate_Gate.png/40px-Twisted_Fate_Gate.png?85105 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Twisted_Fate#Gate" title="Twisted Fate">Gate</a></span></span></span></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after spell-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-spell="Teleport" data-game="lol"><span class="border icon-20" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Teleport" title="An icon representing Teleport"><img alt="An icon representing Teleport" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Teleport.png/20px-Teleport.png?b4dbd" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Teleport.png/40px-Teleport.png?b4dbd 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Teleport" title="Teleport">Teleport</a></span></span><p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></li></ul></li></ul>

</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/44px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Projectile</span></div>
<p>A <b>projectile</b> or <b>missile</b> is any entity not classified as a unit (<i><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Champion"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion" title="An icon representing the keyword Champion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/20px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/40px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0 2x" data-file-width="200" data-file-height="200"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion" title="Champion">champion</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Minion"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Minion" title="An icon representing the keyword Minion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/20px-Minion_icon.png?b3697" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/40px-Minion_icon.png?b3697 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Minion" title="Minion">minion</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Monster"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Monster" title="An icon representing the keyword Monster"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Monster" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Monster_icon.png/20px-Monster_icon.png?e9efe" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Monster_icon.png?e9efe 2x" data-file-width="24" data-file-height="24"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Monster" title="Monster">monster</a></span>, etc.</i>) that travels at any given velocity.
</p>
<ul><li>Moving units are <b>not</b> considered projectiles under any circumstance (<i>including <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dash"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Dash" title="An icon representing the keyword Dash"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dash" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Dash.png/20px-Dash.png?e5c61" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Dash.png/40px-Dash.png?e5c61 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Dash" title="Dash">dashing</a></span> units, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Airborne"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Airborne" title="An icon representing the keyword Airborne"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Airborne" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/20px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc" <p>The <b>Nexus Obelisk</b>, (or <b>Fountain Laser</b>), is a turret that deals tons of damage, bypassing survival tools such as <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Invulnerability"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Invulnerability" title="An icon representing the keyword Invulnerability"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Invulnerability" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png/20px-Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png?a8ab9" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png/40px-Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png?a8ab9 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Invulnerability" title="Invulnerability">invulnerability</a></span> and <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Resurrection"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Death#Ways_to_prevent_death_when_reaching_zero_health" title="An icon representing the keyword Resurrection"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Resurrection" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Revival_icon.png/20px-Revival_icon.png?4c111" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Revival_icon.png/40px-Revival_icon.png?4c111 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Death#Ways_to_prevent_death_when_reaching_zero_health" title="Death">resurrection</a></span>. A <b>Nexus Obelisk</b> presides over each team's spawn platform on most maps.
</p>

<p>A <b>spell shield</b> refers to one of several effects that have the capacity to negate hostile abilities from applying to the recipient. A <b>spell shield</b> may negate many active effects coming from <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">champion abilities</a>, <a href="/en-us/Monster" title="Monster">epic monsters</a>, <a href="/en-us/Champion_summoned_units" title="Champion summoned units">champion summoned units</a>, and <a href="/en-us/Item_(League_of_Legends)" class="mw-redirect" title="Item (League of Legends)">items</a>, but almost none from <a href="/en-us/Rune" title="Rune">runes</a> and <a href="/en-us/Summoner_spell" title="Summoner spell">summoner spells</a> with the only exceptions of <span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Arcane Comet" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Arcane_Comet" title="An icon representing Arcane Comet"><img alt="An icon representing Arcane Comet" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Arcane_Comet_rune.png/20px-Arcane_Comet_rune.png?cffe0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Arcane_Comet_rune.png/40px-Arcane_Comet_rune.png?cffe0 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a href="/en-us/Arcane_Comet" title="Arcane Comet">Arcane Comet</a></span></span>, <span class="inline-image label-after spell-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" An effect that <b>stacks additively</b> can be calculated by adding the effects together.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Most <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">champion statistics</a> that stack this way are expressed through flat numbers, but the stats can also be percentages. The following stats <b>stack additively</b>:
